title: nasturtium suffruticosum
intro: Nasturtium suffruticosum, also known as garden cress or creasy greens, is a variety of nasturtium plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It is known for its peppery, spicy flavor and medicinal properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant has been traditionally used to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and relieve respiratory issues due to its expectorant properties. Nasturtium suffruticosum can be prepared as an herbal infusion, tea, or added to salads and other dishes, and can also be used as a natural remedy for colds and sinus congestion.
